title: WOMEN'S CLINIC - 211info
text: WOMEN’S AND FAMILY HEALTH CLINIC TILLAMOOK WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of women's health services. 1011 Third Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 7am-5:30pm, Tuesday-Wednesday 8am-5pm, Friday 7am-4pm (503) 815-2292 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 815-2292 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
